name: @le-space/node
description: Node and GitHub Actions adapters for shared Aleph tooling.

scripts.build: node --check ./src/index.ts && node --check ./src/env.ts && node --check ./src/github-outputs.ts && node --check ./src/signer.ts && node --check ./src/deploy-outputs.ts && node --check ./src/deploy-plan.ts && node --check ./src/deploy-executor.ts && node --check ./src/action-runner.ts && node --check ./src/rootfs-runner.ts && node --check ./src/relay-probe.ts && node --check ./src/site-runner.ts
